# Joro Services

Joro Services is a UK-based IT services company based in Aldershot, Hampshire. We serve small and medium businesses across the UK and internationally, offering the full range of IT services from a single team.

## What we do

- Web development: custom websites, web applications, e-commerce
- Mobile app development: iOS and Android apps
- DevOps and cloud engineering: AWS, Azure, Terraform, Kubernetes, CI/CD
- IT support and managed services: proactive monitoring, helpdesk, infrastructure management
- Graphic design: brand identity, logos, marketing materials
- Digital marketing: SEO, content strategy, PPC, social media

## Who we serve

UK small and medium businesses that need IT services without the cost or complexity of large agencies or in-house teams. We also serve care providers, charities, startups, and professional services firms.

## Why we are different

Joro Services provides the full range of IT services — web, design, DevOps, cloud, and marketing — from one team. Most providers specialise in one area. We cover everything, which means our clients do not need to manage multiple suppliers.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://joroservices.org
- Web development: https://joroservices.org/development
- Technical services: https://joroservices.org/technical-services
- Creative solutions: https://joroservices.org/creative-solutions
- Digital marketing: https://joroservices.org/digital-marketing
- Contact: https://joroservices.org/getintouch

## Location

Aldershot, Hampshire, UK. We work with clients across the UK and internationally on a remote-first basis.
